name: intentional-textual-ui

metadata.name: intentional-textual-ui
metadata.summary: Adds a Textual Terminal User Interface (TUI) for Intentional bots

documentation:
# Intentional - Textual TUI

[![Made for Intentional](https://img.shields.io/badge/made_for-intentional-blue)](https://intentional-ai.github.io/intentional/docs/home/)
[![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/intentional-textual-ui.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/intentional-textual-ui)
[![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/intentional-textual-ui.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/intentional-textual-ui)
[![Copier](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/copier-org/copier/master/img/badge/badge-grayscale-inverted-border-orange.json)](https://github.com/copier-org/copier)

Adds a Textual Terminal User Interface (TUI) for Intentional bots

-----

## Table of Contents

- [Installation](#installation)
- [License](#license)

## Installation

```console
pip install intentional-textual-ui
```

## License

`intentional` is distributed under the terms of the [AGPL](LICENSE.txt) license. If that doesn't work for you, [get in touch](mailto:github@zansara.dev).

modules.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui
documentation: Textual UI for audio stream bots.
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2024-present ZanSara <github@zansara.dev>
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.ChatHistory
documentation: A markdown widget that displays the chat history.

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.UserStatus
documentation: A markdown widget that displays the user status (speaking/silent).

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.SystemPrompt
documentation: A markdown widget that displays the system prompt.

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface.compose
documentation: Layout of the UI.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface.on_mount
documentation: Operations to be performed at mount time.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface.handle_transcript
documentation: Prints the transcripts in the chat history.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface.handle_system_prompt_updated
documentation:
Prints to the console any text message from the bot.

Args:
    event: The event dictionary containing the message.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface.handle_start_user_response
documentation: Updates the user status when they start speaking.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface.handle_finish_user_response
documentation: Updates the user status when they stop speaking.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface.handle_audio_messages
documentation:
Plays audio responses from the bot and updates the bot status line.

Args:
    event: The event dictionary containing the audio message.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.audio_stream_ui.AudioStreamInterface.handle_conversation_end
documentation: At the end of the conversation, closes the UI.
The main interface class for the audio stream bot UI.

modules.name: intentional_textual_ui.bot_interface
documentation: Local bot interface for Intentional.
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2024-present ZanSara <github@zansara.dev>
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.bot_interface.TextualUIBotInterface

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.bot_interface.TextualUIBotInterface.run
documentation: Chooses the specific loop to use for this combination of bot and modality and kicks it off.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.bot_interface.TextualUIBotInterface._run_text_messages
documentation: Runs the CLI interface for the text turns modality.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.bot_interface.TextualUIBotInterface._run_audio_stream
documentation: Runs the CLI interface for the continuous audio streaming modality.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.bot_interface.TextualUIBotInterface._launch_ui
documentation:
Launches the Textual UI interface. If there's any async task that should be run in parallel, it can be passed
as a list of callables to the `gather` parameter.

Args:
    gather: A list of callables that should be run in parallel with the UI.
Bot that uses a Textual UI command line interface to interact with the user.

modules.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui
documentation: Textual UI for text-based bots.
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2024-present ZanSara <github@zansara.dev>
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.ChatHistory
documentation: A markdown widget that displays the chat history.

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.MessageBox
documentation: An input widget that allows the user to type a message.

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.SystemPrompt
documentation: A markdown widget that displays the system prompt.

classes.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.TextChatInterface

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.TextChatInterface.compose
documentation: Layout for the text-based bot UI.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.TextChatInterface.on_mount
documentation: Operations to perform when the UI is mounted.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.TextChatInterface.send_message
documentation:
Sends a message to the bot when the user presses enter.

Args:
    event: The event containing the message to send.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.TextChatInterface.handle_start_text_response
documentation: Prints to the console when the bot starts generating a text response.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.TextChatInterface.handle_finish_text_response
documentation: Prints to the console when the bot stops generating a text response.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.TextChatInterface.handle_text_messages
documentation:
Prints to the console any text message from the bot. It is usually a chunk as the output is being streamed out.

Args:
    event: The event dictionary containing the message chunk.

methods.name: intentional_textual_ui.text_chat_ui.TextChatInterface.handle_system_prompt_updated
documentation:
Prints to the console any text message from the bot.

Args:
    event: The event dictionary containing the message.
The main interface class for the text-based bot UI.
